name: ADR validator confirms a status field is present and uses the MADR allowed enum values
command: mkdir -p docs/adr && printf '# 0001 D1\nstatus: proposed\n' > docs/adr/0001-d1.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/adr/validate-naming.sh" --adr-dir docs/adr --check status 2>out.txt && grep -q 'status=proposed valid=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
